memberdef.name: RateConverter_getset
memberdef.initializer: = { {"rate", (getter)RateConverterObj_get_rate, (setter)RateConverterObj_set_rate, "Output-to-input sample rate ratio.", NULL}, {"stages", (getter)RateConverterObj_get_stages, NULL, "List of stage labels (e.g. ['CIC(8)', 'Resampler(0.8)']).", NULL}, {NULL} }
